name: notes_grpc
description: Notes application with microservices architecture using gRPC

scripts.nuke: pnpm -r run clean && rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune
scripts.prisma:generate: pnpm --filter @notes/auth-service run prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @notes/notes-service run prisma:generate
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: pnpm --filter @notes/auth-service run prisma:migrate:dev && pnpm --filter @notes/notes-service run prisma:migrate:dev
scripts.dev:prepare: pnpm --filter @notes/shared-types run build && pnpm --filter @notes/grpc-clients run build && pnpm --filter @notes/auth-service run prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @notes/notes-service run prisma:generate
scripts.seed: pnpm --filter @notes/auth-service run db:seed && pnpm --filter @notes/notes-service run db:seed
scripts.test: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e

author: Pankaj Jangid
